idea-plugin.name: GitHub Dark Colorblind Islands
idea-plugin.description:
GitHub Light and Dark Colorblind inspired themes adapted for JetBrains IDEs with the Islands parent themes.
The palette follows GitHub's Colorblind / Primer color tokens and maps success to blue, danger to orange, strings to light blue, functions and variables to purple, and entities to orange. Includes italic and no-italic variants for both dark and light modes.
